---
name: Bug report
about: Report a confirmed Cirth bug with a reduced reproduction.
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

Please search existing and closed issues before opening a new one.

## Current Behavior

What is happening?

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction

Link to a reduced reproduction, such as CodePen, StackBlitz, or a minimal
repository. Please do not link to a full production project.

## Affected CSS

Which stylesheet or variant are you using?

- [ ] `cirth.css`
- [ ] `cirth.classless.css`
- [ ] `cirth.scoped.css`
- [ ] `cirth.classless.scoped.css`
- [ ] Theme variant
- [ ] Other

## Environment

- Cirth version:
- Browser and version:
- Operating system:
- Package manager or CDN:

## Additional Context

Anything else that helps explain the issue.
